summary: Additional PDA eligible areas (potential Blueprint transit) for Bay Area with jurisdiction, county, and acreage.
Nike store sales territory data for California with apparel, footwear, and athletic shoe purchase behavior metrics.
VTA Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) corridor route data for Bay Area with line abbreviation, schedule, and distance.
Preservation priority area for 20-49 unit renter buildings in Bay Area with rent burden and income data.
Census block racial composition data for Bay Area showing Hispanic/Latino and non-Hispanic populations by race.
Race and ethnicity by census block for Bay Area with non-Hispanic Black, Asian, White, and other population counts.
Bay Area Vital Signs regional housing permit data by year with single-family, multi-family shares and total units.
Bay Area rent burden data (30%+ of income) by block group with non-white renter and low-income household percentages.
Bay Area transit service areas from 2020 with route type, agency name, agency ID, and geographic boundaries.
Priority Development Area (PDA) boundaries for Bay Area with subregion, plan status, lead agency, and fipco codes.
